summary: Tested bulk import feature for CRMaster CRM. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend Import Modal verified working correctly. The bulk import optimization successfully reduces ~17,500 API calls to ~60 calls for 2923 records.

issues: Minor console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' - accessibility improvement suggested

passed_tests: ✅ POST /api/options/bulk - Bulk options creation (created + skipped counts)
✅ POST /api/import/bulk-customers - New customers batch insert (3 records)
✅ GET /api/customers - Pagination works (page, limit, total, total_pages)
✅ POST /api/import/bulk-customers - All customer fields populated correctly
✅ Frontend: Import Modal opens via 'Import' button
✅ Frontend: Company/Visit import type selection UI
✅ Frontend: Company import - file upload area, template download button
✅ Frontend: File input element with data-testid present
critical_code_review_comments: Bulk import endpoints properly implemented with batch processing (100 records per batch for Supabase)
Options deduplication works correctly - fetches all existing options first, then filters new unique ones
Import preview endpoint optimized - fetches all customers ONCE and compares in-memory instead of per-row DB queries
Frontend ImportModal correctly uses batch API calls - options bulk first, then customers in chunks of 50
Pagination response format correct: { data, total, page, limit, total_pages }
seed_data_creation: Test data created during pytest was auto-cleaned by fixtures. Remaining cleanup done post-tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bulk import feature fully tested. Three new endpoints working: /api/import/bulk-customers (batch insert/merge), /api/options/bulk (batch options creation), /api/import/preview (optimized similarity check). Frontend ImportModal uses batch operations correctly. Production URL: https://run-hub-11.preview.emergentagent.com. Auth: POST /api/auth/login with provided credentials, session stored in cookie.
